plugin.risk-management.screen.register.s: Risk register linked to assets, controls, owners, workflow, and evidence.
plugin.risk-management.screen.board.subt: Lifecycle and evidence board for treated and accepted risks.
Risk categories are business-managed cat: Risk categories are business-managed catalog values from `Reference catalogs`. Risk workflow states such as `assessing`, `accepted`, or `closed` are system-controlled.
Risk Detail keeps evidence, workflow, li: Risk Detail keeps evidence, workflow, linked records, ownership, and treatment maintenance in one workspace. Use the risk register to browse risks and open the one you want to work on.
Title: Title
Selecting an actor adds another owner in: Selecting an actor adds another owner instead of replacing the current set.
This list stays focused on category, sco: This list stays focused on category, score, owner summary, linked records, state, and Open. Use Risk Detail to manage evidence, workflow, and treatment maintenance.
This board stays focused on workflow sta: This board stays focused on workflow state and review history. Open a risk from the Risk Register when you need to manage transitions, evidence, ownership, or treatment details.
No risks with workflow activity yet.
